news.title: Magnitude 7.5 earthquake strikes northern Japan; tsunami warning issued
news.snippet: A strong magnitude 7.5 earthquake has struck off northern Japan, prompting authorities to issue a tsunami warning for waves of up to 3 metres (10 feet).

news.title: Pakistan places $1.5 billion Sudan weapons sale on hold after Saudi objection, sources say
